prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一 流；软科主榜约第74名（2026年），近年排名稳定在69–78区间；2026年声誉评价偏正面：南昌大学男子排球队在2025–2026中国大学生排球联赛总决赛中夺冠， 大幅提升学校体育声誉与公众关注度；抖音热度排名第43位（较热），综合热度约96.6万，反映报考关注度较高。2023年曾出现投档线异常信号（低关注度），但未形成持续性负 面舆情；食品科学与工程获评A+（第五轮），为该校唯一A-及以上学科，与招生专业中的食品科学与工程类、食品质量与安全等专业直接对应，对相关专业报考 有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 2026年专业热度数据显示：计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等工科专业持续高热推荐，临床医学、口腔医学为推荐偏热，法学分化 观望，新闻传播明显劝退。该校在浙江省招生专业覆盖计算机、电气、临床医学、法学等热门方向，对考生吸引力较强。浙江省2026年高考考生总数约40万人（普通高考），较20 25年29万人大幅增长约37.5%，竞争显著加剧；南昌大学位于江西省南昌市，非浙江省本地高校，在浙江省无本地招生倾 斜。该校在浙江省招生人数占全国总招生比例约5%左右（2025年数据），属跨省招生，无地域偏好优势。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次48104名、2026年计划小幅缩招（- 5.1%）、浙江省考生数大幅增长约37.5%带来的竞争加剧、学校声誉偏正面（男排夺冠+抖音较热）以及优势学科A+的吸引力，预计2026年最低录取位次较2025年有所前移（数字减 小），但受考生总数激增的抵消效应，前移幅度有限。预测最低位次约47000名，区间46500–47500名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: 2021–2025 minimum rankings approximately 31995→30153→29033→53964→48104, rankings continuously moved forward (decreasing numbers) from 2021 to 2023, significantly moved backward to 53964 in 2024 due to factors such as major group splitting, rebounded to 48104 in 2025, with large fluctuations in recent two years; 2025 baseline approximately 48104; enrollment plan in Zhejiang Province: 156 in 2021, 163 in 2022, 162 in 2023, 174 in 2024, 175 in 2025, showing a trend of slight annual expansion. 2026 enrollment plan: 134 for comprehensive category + 32 for medical category, total 166, a decrease of 9 (-5.1%) compared to 2025, a slight contraction, slightly easing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; Soft Science main ranking approximately 74th (2026), stable in the 69–78 range in recent years; 2026 reputation evaluation slightly positive: Nanchang University men's volleyball team won the championship in the 2025–2026 China University Volleyball League finals, significantly enhancing the university's sports reputation and public attention; Douyin popularity ranking 43rd (relatively hot), comprehensive popularity approximately 966,000, reflecting high application attention. In 2023, there was an abnormal signal of admission cutoff line (low attention), but it did not form persistent negative public opinion; Food Science and Engineering rated A+ (fifth round), the only A- or above discipline at the university, directly corresponding to majors such as Food Science and Engineering, Food Quality and Safety in the enrollment, strongly attracting applications for related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: 2026 major popularity data shows: Computer, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and other engineering majors continue to be highly recommended, Clinical Medicine, Stomatology are recommended as relatively hot, Law is divided and wait-and-see, Journalism and Communication is clearly discouraged. The university's enrollment majors in Zhejiang Province cover popular directions such as Computer, Electrical, Clinical Medicine, Law, strongly attracting candidates. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Zhejiang Province college entrance examination is approximately 400,000 (regular college entrance examination), a significant increase of about 37.5% compared to 290,000 in 2025, sharply intensifying competition; Nanchang University is located in Nanchang City, Jiangxi Province, not a local university in Zhejiang Province, with no local enrollment preference in Zhejiang. The university's enrollment in Zhejiang Province accounts for about 5% of the national total enrollment (2025 data), belonging to cross-provincial enrollment, with no regional preference advantage.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 48104, slight contraction in 2026 enrollment plan (-5.1%), intensified competition due to a significant increase of about 37.5% in Zhejiang candidate numbers, slightly positive university reputation (men's volleyball championship + relatively hot on Douyin), and the attractiveness of A+ discipline, it is predicted that the 2026 minimum admission ranking will move forward (decreasing number) compared to 2025, but the forward movement is limited due to the offsetting effect of the surge in total candidates. Predicted minimum ranking approximately 47000, range 46500–47500.

For rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<46500), focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors; for rankings close to the upper limit of the range (>47500), mainly choose Tier 3 advantageous majors. Nanchang University's Food Science and Engineering is an A+ discipline, although it belongs to the broader category of biology, chemistry, environment, and materials, its disciplinary strength is outstanding and worth paying attention to.

prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 南昌大学医学类在浙江省近五年最低录取位次波动较大：2021年23968名（计划21人），2022年骤降至33303名（计划27人），2023年基本持平于33207名（计划32人），2024年进 一步下滑至45534名（计划31人），2025年回升至41842名（计划32人）。2026年医学类招生计划为32人，与2025年持平，无扩招或缩招压力。整体来看，医学类位次在2021-2024 年间持续走低（竞争加剧），2025年出现明显回调，但计划规模保持稳定。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 南昌大学是国家211工程重点建设高校，同时入选双一流建设高校，位于江西省南昌市，为综合类公办本科院校。作为江西省唯一的211和双一流高校，其医学学科在区域内具有 较强影响力，临床医学等专业办学历史悠久，在浙江省考生中享有较高的认可度。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 医学类专业在浙江省持续保持较高报考热度，临床医学、眼视光医学等核心专业竞争尤为激烈。南昌大学虽地处江西，但作为211高校，其医学类在浙江的招生规模适中（约32人 ），专业设置涵盖临床、预防、影像、药学、护理等方向，能够满足不同分数段考生的医学报考需求。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合M3供需弹性模型计算及历年位次趋势分析，2026年南昌大学医学类最低录取位次预计为42022名左右，较2025年（41842名）小幅回落约180名，反映医学热度持续但计划不变 下的正常波动。建议考生参考区间41602-42442名进行志愿填报。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum admission rankings for Nanchang University's medical programs in Zhejiang Province have fluctuated significantly over the past five years: 23,968 in 2021 (plan: 21 students), sharply dropping to 33,303 in 2022 (plan: 27 students), remaining roughly stable at 33,207 in 2023 (plan: 32 students), further declining to 45,534 in 2024 (plan: 31 students), and rebounding to 41,842 in 2025 (plan: 32 students). In 2026, the medical enrollment plan is 32 students, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or reduction pressure. Overall, the rankings for medical programs continuously decreased from 2021 to 2024 (increased competition), with a clear rebound in 2025, but the plan size remains stable.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Nanchang University is a key national university under the 211 Project and is also selected as a Double First-Class construction university. Located in Nanchang City, Jiangxi Province, it is a comprehensive public undergraduate institution. As the only 211 and Double First-Class university in Jiangxi Province, its medical disciplines have strong influence in the region, with clinical medicine and other majors having a long history of operation, enjoying high recognition among Zhejiang Province candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text: Medical majors continue to maintain high application popularity in Zhejiang Province, with core majors such as clinical medicine and ophthalmology-optometry being particularly competitive. Although Nanchang University is located in Jiangxi, as a 211 university, its medical enrollment scale in Zhejiang is moderate (about 32 students), covering majors such as clinical medicine, preventive medicine, medical imaging, pharmacy, and nursing, meeting the medical application needs of candidates across different score ranges.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the M3 supply-demand elasticity model calculation and historical ranking trend analysis, the minimum admission ranking for Nanchang University's medical programs in 2026 is expected to be around 42,022, a slight decrease of about 180 places from 2025 (41,842), reflecting normal fluctuations under sustained medical popularity and unchanged plan. It is recommended that candidates refer to the range of 41,602-42,442 for volunteer application.
